title: Rates Are Going Higher in March: 5 Safe and Secure Dividend Stocks to Jump on Now
text: January cannot be over soon enough for most investors, as the stock market has struggled through the worst month since March of 2020.

title: Dominion Energy Awards $50,000 to Virginia Arts Nonprofits
text: RICHMOND, Va., Jan. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Dominion Energy Charitable Foundation named five nonprofit arts organizations as 2022 Dominion Energy ArtStars for inspiring people of all ages in creative endeavors.

title: Dominion Energy Utah to Launch Program for Customers to Affordably Reduce Carbon Footprint
text: SALT LAKE CITY, Jan. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dominion Energy customers in Utah and Idaho will soon have a new and affordable way to significantly reduce their carbon footprint. The CarbonRight program will allow customers to voluntarily offset carbon emissions from natural gas use in their home or business by supporting projects, including in Utah, that reduce greenhouse gas emissions.

title: Dominion Energy (D) to Gain From Investment, Customer Addition
text: Dominion Energy (D) with steady investment and an expanding customer base is poised for growth. However, dependence on third parties for the supply of natural gas and the Atlantic Coast Pipeline discontinuation are headwinds.

title: Dominion Energy Donates $1.5M to Environmental Education and Stewardship Initiatives
text: RICHMOND, Va., Jan. 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Dominion Energy Charitable Foundation recently awarded $1.5 million in environmental stewardship grants to support 115 community-based organizations in 10 states working to create a cleaner, greener world and teach citizens young and old to better care for the outdoors.

title: 5 Very Safe Big-Dividend Stocks to Buy Now as Market Correction May Be On
text: We have pointed out for months here at 24/7 Wall St. that the market was very overbought.

title: Dominion Energy: A (Slightly) Undervalued Blue-Chip Dividend Stock
text: The utility's operating EPS payout ratio will be 65.5% in 2021 at the midpoint of its guidance, and this will slightly improve in 2022, despite the recent 6% dividend hike. Dominion Energy's year-to-date revenue fell 5.3% over the year-ago period due to divestitures, but operating EPS surged 8.4% higher during that time.

title: Dominion Energy Virginia Prepares for Weekend Winter Storm, Urges Customers to Prepare as Well
text: RICHMOND, Va., Jan. 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dominion Energy Virginia crews are prepared for the second storm of the year, which is expected to bring winter weather across the company's service area beginning Sunday.

title: Next phase of Grid Transformation Plan Approved for Dominion Energy Virginia Customers
text: RICHMOND, Va., Jan. 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Virginia State Corporation Commission (SCC) today approved, subject to certain requirements, Phase II of the Grid Transformation Plan (GT Plan), the Company's ten-year plan to transform the electric distribution grid.

title: Dominion Energy Making Significant Progress Restoring Power, Preparing for Second Winter Storm
text: RICHMOND, Va., Jan. 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dominion Energy Virginia has made strong progress restoring power to around 330,000 of the nearly 400,000 customers affected by the damaging winter storm, as of 5p.m.

title: Dominion Energy Restoring Power Following Top Five Most Damaging Winter Storm
text: RICHMOND, Va., Jan. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dominion Energy Virginia crews are safely and quickly restoring power to customers affected by Monday's winter storm, which left pockets of heavy damage and impacted travel across Virginia.
